lastReleaseMessage: 20-improvement sweep: fix stale print-path and setState comments; drop the dead section-focus listener; save indicator flashes and announces only on real saves; orientation repaint dedupe; safe boot-failure screen; fonts-ready autofit skips detached nodes; patchNested creates missing path objects; lazy-load html2canvas with an SRI pin on first export; add favicon, canonical, OG meta, noscript; shortcut dialog backdrop dismiss; aria-labels on saved-label actions; new test-data-integrity.mjs plus a node-import guard that un-breaks test-render.mjs; real v1.0.2 changelog bullets; README runtime-dep and tests sections; delete script .bak leftovers

barRaise.topFinding: A finished, tested v1.0.4 fix sweep resolving ~15 of yesterday's findings (the HIGH print-fidelity bug, the Apothocary brand typo, dead PNG export, two chronic findings, the medicinal disclaimer, the 16.6 MB texture eager-load) sits uncommitted in the working tree while the last release stays v1.0.3 (2026-07-03). All three test suites pass green. The live site still carries every one of those bugs and the dashboard reports a clean tree. The single highest-impact action is one deliberate scripts/release.ps1 run to ship v1.0.4; this read-only review flags it as P0 rather than shipping it.

actions.title: Ship the v1.0.4 sweep via scripts/release.ps1 (all tests green, ~15 findings resolved, closes the live-site gap and stale dashboard)
Close the print-fidelity residual: fit the print-stage herb name directly so a collapsed preview section stops leaving it unfitted, pair autofit nodes by identity not index (src/render.js:606-615)
